stories.headline: James Burrows, director of classic TV comedies including ‘Cheers’ and ‘Friends,’ dies at 85 - AP News
stories.summary: James Burrows, the director behind iconic TV comedies like “Cheers,” “Taxi,” “Friends” and “Will and Grace,” has died. His family confirmed his death in a statement to People, saying he passed away p…

stories.headline: Daveigh Chase’s ‘devastated’ mom breaks silence on actress’ shock Skid Row death: ‘I am in so much pain’ - Page Six
stories.summary: The actress rose to fame with roles in “Lilo & Stitch” and “The Ring.”

stories.headline: King Charles offers Prince Harry, family accommodations for UK visit - USA Today
stories.summary: USA TODAY has learned that King Charles offered royal accommodations to Prince Harry and Meghan Markle ahead of their visit to the UK next month.

stories.headline: 'Supergirl' First Reactions Are "Mixed" But Highlight Milly Alcock & Jason Momoa's Roles - Deadline
stories.summary: Supergirl opens in theaters on June 26, and ahead of its release, film critics have shared their first reactions to the Craig Gillespie-directed film on social media.

stories.headline: Hailee Steinfeld reveals name of her and Josh Allen’s daughter - WHEC.com
stories.summary: The question most Buffalo Bills fans have been waiting for has finally been answered. Bills Quarterback Josh Allen and his wife Hailee Steinfeld have released the name of their baby!

stories.headline: Why ‘Widow’s Bay,’ Matthew Rhys and Breakout Kate O’Flynn Should Scare the Rest of the Emmy Comedy Field - Variety
stories.summary: Apple TV's horror comedy 'Widow's Bay,' led by Matthew Rhys and breakout Kate O'Flynn, is surging late in the Emmy comedy race. Can it win?

stories.headline: NeNe Leakes' Son Locked Up Over Unpaid Child Support, Allegedly Skipped Drug Eval - TMZ
stories.summary: "The Real Housewives of Atlanta" alum NeNe Leakes' oldest son, Bryson Bryant, is behind bars after a judge found he violated his probation ... TMZ has learned.

stories.headline: Anne Hathaway announces she is pregnant with her third child - NBC News
stories.summary: Anne Hathaway is pregnant with her third child
